prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次为约3973名→2816名→11040名→1789名→4835名，走势波动剧烈。2023年出现异常大幅后移至11040名，2024年急剧回升至 1789名，2025年又回落至4835名，近两年呈现宽幅震荡格局，2025年基准位次约4835名；该校在青海省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2024年稳定在44–45人，20 25年增至47人，2026年计划40人，较2025年缩招约14.9%，缩招幅度较为显著，理论上使竞争程度有所缓解，位次有望前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（保定） 为211工程、双一流建设高校，2026年软科中国大学排名第84位，属于中上游211层次，在电力行业具有极高声誉和认可度，对青海考生吸引力较强；该校在声誉 评价、抖音热度及投档异常文件中均未出现明显负面或异常记录，声誉整体平稳，未见影响报考心理的重大舆情事件；电气工程学科评估为A，动力工程及工程 热物理为A-，均为电力行业核心学科，与该校招生专业高度匹配，电气类专业长期保持高热报考态势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业在2024年专业热度评估中 被评为"高热推荐"，社会关注度和推荐度持续走高；电子信息/通信、计算机类等工科专业热度亦偏热。青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人，较2025年（约47669人）基本持 平，物理类考生估算约30672人，竞争环境总体稳定。；该校位于河北省保定市，非本省高校，在青海省招生规模较小（40 人左右），属于跨省招生，地域偏好因素对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4835名、2026年缩招约14.9%使位次前移的，以及电气类专 业持续高热、211层次稳定吸引力等正向竞争因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较，最终预测最低位次约4433名，区间3933–4933名。缩招是位次前移的核心驱动，而 专业热度和学校层次则形成一定的竞争支撑，两者共同作用使位次在4400名附近小幅波动。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3933–4933名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次若优于区间下限（<3933名），可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化、计算机科学 与技术等一档王牌专业；位次若接近区间上限（约4933名），应以三档专业保底为主，兼顾二档中等专业。电气类专业为该校核心优势，学科评估A级，社会热度持续高热，值得 优先考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 3973 → 2816 → 11040 → 1789 → 4835, showing drastic fluctuations. In 2023, there was an abnormal large shift to 11040, followed by a sharp recovery to 1789 in 2024, and a drop back to 4835 in 2025, with wide volatility in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4835. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Qinghai Province was stable at 44–45 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 47 in 2025, and is planned at 40 for 2026, a reduction of about 14.9% compared to 2025, which is relatively significant, theoretically easing competition and potentially moving the ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with high reputation and recognition in the electric power industry, strongly attracting Qinghai candidates. The university has no significant negative or abnormal records in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing documents, with overall stable reputation and no major public opinion events affecting application psychology. The electrical engineering discipline is rated A, and power engineering and engineering thermophysics are rated A-, both core disciplines in the electric power industry, highly matching the university's enrollment majors, with electrical majors maintaining high application enthusiasm for a long time.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major was rated as 'highly recommended' in the 2024 major popularity evaluation, with continuously increasing social attention and recommendation. Electronic information/communication, computer science, and other engineering majors are also relatively hot. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is about 48,000, basically flat compared to 2025 (about 47,669), with an estimated 30,672 physics category candidates, indicating a generally stable competitive environment. The university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a local university, with a small enrollment scale in Qinghai (about 40 students), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, so regional preference factors have limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 4835 in 2025, the enrollment reduction of about 14.9% in 2026 moving the ranking forward, and positive competitive factors such as sustained high popularity of electrical majors and stable attractiveness of the 211 level, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 4433, with a range of 3933–4933. The enrollment reduction is the core driver for the ranking moving forward, while major popularity and university level provide certain competitive support, together causing small fluctuations around 4400.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3933–4933, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<3933), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (about 4933), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety, while also considering Tier 2 medium majors. Electrical majors are the core advantage of the university, with an A-level discipline evaluation and sustained high social popularity, worthy of priority consideration.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1127 → 958 → 1460 → 1024 → 837, showing a fluctuating but overall forward trend. The 2025 ranking of 837 is the best in recent years (smallest number), cumulatively moving forward by about 290 places compared to 2021. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Qinghai Province was stable at 4 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 2 in 2025, and remains at 2 for 2026, consistent with 2025. The enrollment scale is extremely small, making rankings susceptible to fluctuations due to the application behavior of a few high-scoring candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 84th in the Soft Science Ranking. Although it is strong in engineering, its 211 status still attracts some liberal arts candidates. The university has no records in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing documents, indicating a stable reputation without major public opinion affecting applications. Its liberal arts-related disciplines did not receive A- or above ratings in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, and its liberal arts programs mainly rely on the overall 211 platform advantage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The law major has high social popularity, with clear advantages for civil service exams. The administrative management major has average popularity and is considered wait-and-see. In 2026, the estimated number of history category candidates in Qinghai Province is about 17,328, a slight increase from 2025 (17,212), indicating a stable competitive environment. The university is located in Baoding, Hebei Province, not a local institution, and enrolls only 2 liberal arts students in Qinghai, representing a very small-scale cross-provincial enrollment, leading to high ranking volatility.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 837, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in history category candidates, and the high popularity of the law major, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The final predicted minimum ranking is approximately 857, with a range of 703–1011. The extremely small enrollment scale is the main source of ranking volatility, while the popularity of the law major provides some support, but the slight increase in total candidates intensifies competition.
